alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Passively grants the defiler a chance for hostile spells to finish the reuse of Nightmares or Maelstrom.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Dream Haunter

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: A replacement spell for Deathward. This spell casts quicker and becomes far more powerful than Deathward when the target is below 50% health.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Death Cries

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Carrion Warding and Purulence have a chance to finish the reuse of Ancestral Channeling.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Defiled Alacrity

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Increases the health threshold of Wraithwall.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Wraith Howl

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: When Wraithwall absorbs damage, it will reduce incoming damage to the target for a short duration.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Dominated Defenses

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Improves the range and radius of the defiler's beneficial and impairment spells.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Spiritrealm

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: When the defiler casts spells that are not Deathward, Death Cries or Ancient Shroud, they grant the group additional Crit Bonus that dispels when they do cast Deathward, Death Cries or Ancient Shroud. This increments up to 12 times. Carrion Warding, Spiritual Sacrifice and Wraithwall do not modify the increment count or remove the effect.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Empowered Dominion

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Spiritual Dominion grants increased mitigation to the group. The effect is multiplied by the amount of increments of Spiritual Dominion.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Spiritarmor

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: When the defiler casts four or more spells that are not Deathward, Death Cries or Ancient Shroud, they gain an additional ward on the target when they do cast Deathward, Death Cries or Ancient Shroud. Once one of these spells is cast, the count resets. Carrion Warding, Spiritual Sacrifice and Wraithwall do not modify the count or apply the ward.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Empowered Barrier

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Applies a small ward to the defiler's two allies with the lowest health percentages. The targets must be within 50 meters of the defiler. This spell can be cast while casting other spells.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Phantasmal Barrier

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: This spell is applied to the target ally and cannot be cast on the defiler. It reduces the defilers max health and grants the target a health increase. If the target ally dies while this spell is active, their group will receive damage reduction for a short duration. This spell has no reuse if it is toggled off manually. This spell can be cast while casting other spells.
alternateadvancementnode_list.title: the Wraithcaller
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Spiritual Sacrifice

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Inflicts damage to the target and nearby enemies when they strike the caster's primary wards.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Ward's Bane

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: A replacement for Putrefy. This spell inflicts poison damage and reduces the target's attributes. The damage over time, STR, AGI and INT components are multiplied by the amount of increments of this spell the caster has active on the target.
alternateadvancementnode_list.title: the Soul Dominator
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Spiritwrath

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: The priest's heals have a chance to increase the target's flurry chance and doublecast chance.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Invigorate

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: As Spiritual Dominion increments, Ancient Shroud, Deathward and Death Cries will cast faster.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Spirit Domination

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Grant's Crit Bonus Overcap to the Defiler.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Critical Channeling

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Improves the Crit Bonus of Spiritual Dominion.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Ethereal Souls

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Wards the target from all damage. Only absorbs damage that would cause the target to fall below 20% health. Higher ranks of this ability lower the reuse time.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Wraithwall

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Wraithwall will apply an extremely fast regenerating ward to the target.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Soultemper

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: A replacement for Sinister Countenance. The defiler takes on a wraith form and increases their wisdom along with the group's stamina, spell resistance and the ability to see invisible creatures. The defiler gains increased movement speed as well.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Countenance of Defiled Spirits

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: Grant's Fervor to the Defiler.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Potent Medium

alternateadvancementnode_list.description: The priest's hostile actions have a chance to trigger damage reduction for their group.
alternateadvancementnode_list.name: Brainstorm
